title: Getting Started with 1Grow
description: Set up your account, create your organization, and start managing your business in under 10 minutes.
content: This tutorial walks you through the complete setup process.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.content: Visit 1grow.in and click Start Free Trial. Enter your email, phone number, and create a password. You will receive a verification email.

steps.title: Set Up Your Organization
steps.content: After verifying your email, you will be prompted to create your organization. Enter your business name, select your industry (Training, Rental, or Event), and add your branch location.

steps.title: Select Your Modules
steps.content: Choose the modules you want to activate. You can start with one module and add more later as your business grows.

steps.title: Invite Your Team
steps.content: Add your staff members by entering their email addresses. Assign roles like Branch Manager, Trainer, or Staff based on their responsibilities.

steps.title: Start Operating
steps.content: Your organization is now ready. Start adding students, creating batches, or setting up inventory depending on your selected modules.

title: Setting Up Automated Fee Collection
description: Configure fee plans, payment reminders, and automated receipts for your training academy.
content: Learn how to automate your entire fee collection process.

steps.title: Create Fee Plans
steps.content: Navigate to Settings > Fee Plans and create plans for each course. Set the total fee, installment options, and due dates.

steps.title: Enable Payment Reminders
steps.content: Go to Settings > Notifications and enable automatic reminders. Set reminders for 3 days before, on the due date, and 3 days after.

steps.title: Connect Payment Gateway
steps.content: Integrate your preferred payment gateway to accept online payments. Parents can pay directly from the reminder link.

steps.title: Track Collections
steps.content: Use the Finance dashboard to see real-time collection status, pending amounts, and overdue accounts.

title: Setting Up Rental Inventory and Bookings
description: Create your rental catalog, configure availability, and manage the booking lifecycle.
content: A complete guide to rental inventory management.

steps.title: Add Inventory Items
steps.content: Go to Inventory > Add Item. Enter the item name, category, SKU, quantity, condition, and rental price per day.

steps.title: Configure Availability
steps.content: Set availability rules for each item. Define maintenance schedules, blocked dates, and minimum rental periods.

steps.title: Create Booking Workflow
steps.content: Configure the booking lifecycle: Enquiry > Quotation > Confirmation > Dispatch > Return. Each stage triggers appropriate notifications.

steps.title: Set Up Dispatch Process
steps.content: Define the dispatch checklist: item inspection, condition documentation, handover to customer, and expected return date.
